title: ROUGE NOIR / Photoreal Storyboard Board
summary: Blender panels are composition-only. This board defines the full 30s visual flow before photoreal key visual generation and Seedance motion.
gate_note: Do not run image generation or Seedance until this board and the key visual generation conditions are approved.
primary_note: Only panels 01, 03, 04, and 06 become primary key visual candidates for Seedance after photoreal generation and human approval.
support_note: Panels 02, 05, 07, and 08 are continuity, material, mood, or post-production plates. They are not Seedance primary inputs by themselves.

hero.title: Premium lipstick world / black, champagne gold, deep rouge
hero.note: Use only as composition and product-memory guide. Convert graphic light marks into photographic bokeh, soft glints, rim light, and lens bloom.

panels.title: Dark Silhouette Hook
panels.content: Black space, lipstick silhouette, deep luxury restraint, warm rim light.

panels.title: Cap Macro / Material Reveal
panels.content: Black lacquer, champagne-gold metal, macro reflections, tactile product material.

panels.title: Hero Product Reveal
panels.content: Centered hero packshot, premium reflections, product memory, no raw Blender look.

panels.title: Anonymous Lips Macro
panels.content: Lips-only crop, same dark premium lighting world, no full face, no hand, no testimonial.

panels.title: Rouge Texture / Shine
panels.content: After-application deep rouge gloss, refined beauty texture, realistic skin detail.
panels.seedance_use: support panel for Clip 02 middle beat

panels.title: Product Returns / Final Packshot
panels.content: Return to product, final packshot, safe negative space for post text.

panels.title: Brand Mood Bridge
panels.content: Black, gold, deep red, soft photographic light, no person, no logo.

panels.title: Title-Safe Endcard Plate
panels.content: Clean post-production plate with no baked ROUGE NOIR text.
